profile.name: Surjit Singh
profile.title: AI/ML & Python Backend Engineer
profile.summary: AI Platform Engineer with 4+ years building production LLM platforms, GPU infrastructure, and distributed systems. Architected self-hosted LLM inference with vLLM/Ollama on Kubernetes, reducing cloud costs by 27% and API latency by 30%. Proven track record modernizing legacy architectures and deploying scalable ML/LLM pipelines from prototype to production.

achievements: Architected self-hosted LLM platform using vLLM, Ollama, PyTorch, and Chroma DB for RAG, integrated SSO and RBAC
Deployed GPU workloads on Kubernetes for scalable ML/LLM inference, reducing API latency by 30%
Designed Enterprise AI Platform with multi-turn conversational interface, agentic framework, and prompt library
Built production Kubernetes hosting platform with NGINX, Vault, and Argo CD for GitOps deployments
Automated distributed training and deployment using Ray for scalable ML model processing
Optimized cloud infrastructure through rightsizing, reducing costs by 27%
Optimized BERT/Huggingface NLP models, improving F1 score from 71 to 91
Reduced inference latency by 20% via model quantization and batch processing
Built RESTful APIs using Flask and FastAPI for model serving
Processed multilingual datasets for NLP model training

projects.title: Enterprise AI Platform
projects.description: Production-grade conversational AI platform with self-hosted LLM inference on in-house GPU infrastructure using vLLM for high-throughput, low-latency responses. Built as an agentic framework with pre-built agents, prompt libraries, and RBAC for multi-tenant isolation.
achievements: Self-hosted LLM inference pipeline on GPU infrastructure using vLLM for 10x faster inference
ChatGPT-like conversational interface with multi-turn context and enterprise-grade UI
Agentic framework with pre-built agents, customizable templates, and prompt library for reusability
Chroma DB for RAG implementation with vector search and semantic retrieval
Fine-grained RBAC with multi-tenant isolation and integration with OAuth2 identity provider

projects.title: Enterprise Identity Platform
projects.description: OAuth2 & OpenID Connect multi-tenant authentication platform with JWT auth and RBAC for enterprise-scale identity management.
achievements: Implemented OAuth2 & OpenID Connect compliance from specification
Designed multi-tenant architecture with secure isolation
Built fine-grained RBAC system with 100+ permission types

projects.title: Kubernetes Hosting Platform
projects.description: Production-ready Kubernetes hosting platform with NGINX, Vault, and Argo CD pre-configured on a single VM.
achievements: Configured Kubernetes on single VM for development and production workloads
Integrated NGINX Ingress Controller and HashiCorp Vault for secret management
Implemented Argo CD for GitOps-style deployments

projects.title: Notification Service Platform
projects.description: Stateless FastAPI notification service with Kafka-based async consumers for reliable event-driven messaging.
achievements: Built stateless API with Protocol Buffers for serialization
Implemented Kafka consumers for async event processing
Integrated Twilio for SMS, WhatsApp, and Email delivery

achievements.title: 27% Cloud Cost Savings
achievements.description: Optimized cloud infrastructure through rightsizing, reserved instances, and efficient resource utilization

achievements.title: 30% API Latency Reduction
achievements.description: Improved API response times through caching, query optimization, and code refactoring

achievements.title: 91% Model Accuracy
achievements.description: Achieved state-of-the-art model performance through fine-tuning and data optimization

achievements.title: 1000+ Daily Users
achievements.description: Built systems serving 1000+ active daily users with 99.9% uptime
